title: What if
wikitext:
[]: What if...(Spoilers) Post by bladerj » Fri Jun 25, 2010 12:42 am 1-What if when gendo relay command to fuy, he actually booked it ? 2-What if gendo went to the party ? 3-What if Rei piloted eva-03 when the angel took control ? What new hability would it posses ? 4-What if Zeruel absorved Asuka instead ? 5-What if Maya iNerv broke? Answer and continue :)

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 25, 2010 1:01 am 1-What if you knew how to spell? 2-What if you knew what the word "grammar" meant? 3-What if you knew where to place punctuation? 4-What if you could arrange sentences in legible forms?

[]: Post by mastervampire » Fri Jun 25, 2010 5:07 am Thats so harsh

[]: Post by Oz » Fri Jun 25, 2010 5:18 am There's nothing wrong with bladerj's grammar, Legendary. Orthography is the problem. One of the sentences might be a bit weird, but apart from that the questions are legible.

[]: Post by ran1 » Fri Jun 25, 2010 8:00 am Seconding what Oz noted. The orthography isn't one of a native English speaker.

[]: Post by carla » Fri Jun 25, 2010 9:27 am ^ i resent that. i know plenty native english speakers that have horrid orthography. some my classmates in college used to come to me so i would correct their essays and such, and i saw some really messed up orthography there. this happens in every language, of course, but i think english is especially hard when it comes to orthography because there are so many nuances in the pronunciation. your orthography isn't fully phonemic. anyway, as for the questions... 1. i really don't understand this one. sorry. 2. it would've been awkwaaaaaaaarddddd. 3. uh, i think it would've been much of the same. or unit-03 might've grown boobs, like zeruel did. 4. he might've been prettier. (sorry, sorry, just my personal opinion). 5. maya's iNerv can't break. if the technology is so advanced that it can somehow find a wireless connection after NERV is practically destroyed and they're in the middle of third freakin' impact, i'm sure they found a way to protect it from software malfuction or even physical damage. it will live on forever as a reminder of the good humanity was able to create. LOL.

[]: Post by Jinroh » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:23 am 6) What if this thread was interesting?

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:28 am Enough wet-blanket behavior.
